alpine-baselayout@60a7585bbab2fa0f762504.rationale: The commit-pinned recipe subtree contains one non-source maintainer-script alias; its exact safe relative target is reviewed and it cannot replace APKBUILD or a checksummed source.

alpine-keys@b9f23becced4d7b3ccc0fa0f2853.rationale: APKBUILD constructs its source list from a static architecture-key table; every resulting key is a regular file in the commit-pinned recipe and is verified against sha512sums.

busybox@c3ef5d10e6ef6528852c51f0564963e2.rationale: APKBUILD expands three static filename-list variables in its source block; every sha512sums entry is retained and either verified against a regular recipe file or downloaded and verified from the pinned Alpine distfiles release.

readline@a854c03acdac188901fb012f7acbee7.rationale: APKBUILD generates its upstream patch source aliases with a bounded shell loop; every sha512sums entry is retained and either verified against a regular recipe file or downloaded and verified from the pinned Alpine distfiles release.

LicenseRef-Public-Domain.rationale: Upstream public-domain notices are retained verbatim from the exact sources.

distribution_approval.rationale: A maintainer must review the produced archives and recipient delivery before enabling a release.
